summary: FQ-04 first combat gear slice: sword_crude (weapon slot, attack_damage 3) and the crude armor set (helmet/torso/feet, armor 1/2/1) added to data/equipment.json, forged at the Town Hall via new craft_sword and craft_armor_set recipes with fit-checks before stockpile consumption. player.attack_damage() feeds the existing hit path (1 bare-handed) so a sword one-shots a fresh slime; player.armor_total() sums the armor effect over all equipped gear and take_damage applies flat mitigation with a minimum 1-health chip (no immunity; non-positive amounts stay a no-op). Two town-panel forge buttons, toolbelt Weapon/Armor state, and an Attack/Armor summary in the equipment panel. Rings/amulet/accessory stay inert. Smoke 149 -> 157, validator extended for combat items/recipes. Review: no must-fix; 2 should-fix + 2 nits fixed, 2 nits accepted; re-verified green.
scope: FQ-04 only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md. Implementation commit 4802c06 plus this evidence-only packet commit.
next_action: FQ-05: Mana or Attunement system MVP.
